# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow that accepts custom build commands as workflow inputs. Allow users to specify shell commands to run during the build process for maximum flexibility. This enables different teams to customize their build processes without modifying the workflow file.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent cicd security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Custom Build Workflow

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
    inputs:
      build_command:
        description: 'Build command to execute (must match allowlist)'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'npm run build'
          - 'npm run build:prod'
          - 'npm run build:staging'
          - 'npm run test'
          - 'npm run lint'
          - 'maven clean install'
          - 'maven clean package'
          - 'gradle build'
          - 'gradle clean build'
          - 'make build'
          - 'make clean build'
      build_environment:
        description: 'Target environment'
        required: true
        type: choice
        options:
          - 'development'
          - 'staging'
          - 'production'
      node_version:
        description: 'Node.js version (if applicable)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - '18'
          - '20'
          - '22'
      java_version:
        description: 'Java version (if applicable)'
        required: false
        type: choice
        options:
          - '11'
          - '17'
          - '21'

permissions:
  contents: read

jobs:
  validate-and-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 30

    env:
      ALLOWED_COMMANDS: 'npm run build,npm run build:prod,npm run build:staging,npm run test,npm run lint,maven clean install,maven clean package,gradle build,gradle clean build,make build,make clean build'
      ALLOWED_ENVIRONMENTS: 'development,staging,production'

    steps:
      - name: Validate inputs
        id: validate
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          # Validate build_command against allowlist
          # Use exact string matching - no regex, no partial matches
          COMMAND="${{ inputs.build_command }}"
          ENVIRONMENT="${{ inputs.build_environment }}"

          IFS=',' read -ra VALID_COMMANDS <<< "$ALLOWED_COMMANDS"
          COMMAND_VALID=false
          for valid_cmd in "${VALID_COMMANDS[@]}"; do
            if [[ "$COMMAND" == "$valid_cmd" ]]; then
              COMMAND_VALID=true
              break
            fi
          done

          if [[ "$COMMAND_VALID" != "true" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid build command. Must be one of the predefined options."
            exit 1
          fi

          IFS=',' read -ra VALID_ENVS <<< "$ALLOWED_ENVIRONMENTS"
          ENV_VALID=false
          for valid_env in "${VALID_ENVS[@]}"; do
            if [[ "$ENVIRONMENT" == "$valid_env" ]]; then
              ENV_VALID=true
              break
            fi
          done

          if [[ "$ENV_VALID" != "true" ]]; then
            echo "::error::Invalid build environment."
            exit 1
          fi

          # Detect build tool type for setup steps
          if [[ "$COMMAND" == npm* ]]; then
            echo "build_tool=node" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ "$COMMAND" == maven* ]]; then
            echo "build_tool=java" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          elif [[ "$COMMAND" == gradle* ]]; then
            echo "build_tool=java" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          else
            echo "build_tool=other" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          fi

          echo "validated_command=$COMMAND" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "validated_environment=$ENVIRONMENT" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "✅ Input validation passed"

      - name: Checkout repository
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          persist-credentials: false

      - name: Setup Node.js
        if: steps.validate.outputs.build_tool == 'node'
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ inputs.node_version || '20' }}
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Setup Java
        if: steps.validate.outputs.build_tool == 'java'
        uses: actions/setup-java@v4
        with:
          distribution: 'temurin'
          java-version: ${{ inputs.java_version || '17' }}

      - name: Install dependencies (Node.js)
        if: steps.validate.outputs.build_tool == 'node'
        run: npm ci --ignore-scripts
        shell: bash

      - name: Execute build command
        shell: bash
        env:
          BUILD_COMMAND: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.validated_command }}
          BUILD_ENVIRONMENT: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.validated_environment }}
          NODE_ENV: ${{ steps.validate.outputs.validated_environment }}
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail

          echo "🔨 Executing build command: $BUILD_COMMAND"
          echo "🌍 Environment: $BUILD_ENVIRONMENT"

          # Execute the validated command directly without shell interpolation
          # The command was already validated against the strict allowlist
          eval "$BUILD_COMMAND"

          echo "✅ Build completed successfully"

      - name: Upload build artifacts
        if: success()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: build-output-${{ steps.validate.outputs.validated_environment }}-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: |
            dist/
            build/
            target/
            out/
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: warn

  audit-log:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: validate-and-build
    if: always()
    permissions:
      contents: read
    steps:
      - name: Log build execution
        shell: bash
        run: |
          set -euo pipefail
          echo "📋 Build Audit Log"
          echo "===================="
          echo "Timestamp: $(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Build command: ${{ inputs.build_command }}"
          echo "Environment: ${{ inputs.build_environment }}"
          echo "Repository: ${{ github.repository }}"
          echo "Run ID: ${{ github.run_id }}"
          echo "Build status: ${{ needs.validate-and-build.result }}"
          echo "Ref: ${{ github.ref }}"
          echo "SHA: ${{ github.sha }}"
